hooks.command: npx prettier --write "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || black "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || rustfmt "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || gofmt -w "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true
lines=$(wc -l < "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); [ "$lines" -le 250 ] || echo "WARNING: $FILE_PATH has $lines lines (limit 250, Working Memory Cliff). Consider splitting."
case "$FILE_PATH" in *.py) python -m py_compile "$FILE_PATH" 2>&1;; *.json) python -m json.tool "$FILE_PATH" > /dev/null 2>&1;; *.sh) bash -n "$FILE_PATH" 2>&1;; esac || true

if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then echo '{"block":true,"message":"Cannot edit on main/master. Create a feature branch first."}' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

if [ -f "$FILE_PATH" ] && grep -qE '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|PRIVATE.KEY|-----BEGIN.*(RSA|EC|DSA|OPENSSH))' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo '{"block":true,"message":"Potential secret/key detected in file! Remove before writing."}' >&2; exit 2; fi

echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE '(rm -rf /|git reset --hard|git push.*--force|DROP TABLE|TRUNCATE)' && { echo '{"block":true,"message":"Destructive command blocked. Use with explicit user approval only."}' >&2; exit 2; } || true

if [ -d brain/01-daily ]; then d=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); f="brain/01-daily/${d}.md"; [ -f "$f" ] || echo "# Session Log: ${d}" > "$f"; echo "" >> "$f"; echo "## Session ended: $(date +%H:%M)" >> "$f"; echo "" >> "$f"; fi

if [ -d brain/01-daily ]; then d=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); f="brain/01-daily/${d}.md"; [ -f "$f" ] || echo "# Session Log: ${d}" > "$f"; echo "" >> "$f"; echo "## Session started: $(date +%H:%M)" >> "$f"; echo "" >> "$f"; fi; if [ -f tasks/lessons.md ]; then echo 'REMINDER: Read tasks/lessons.md for past learnings'; fi; if [ -f tasks/current.md ]; then echo 'REMINDER: Read tasks/current.md for handoff context'; fi

if [ -d brain/01-daily ]; then d=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); echo "" >> "brain/01-daily/${d}.md"; echo "## Pre-compaction save: $(date +%H:%M)" >> "brain/01-daily/${d}.md"; echo 'IMPORTANT: Save current task state to tasks/current.md before compaction'; fi
